---
title: "AstraZeneca"
---

# Company Overview

**AstraZeneca** 是一家总部位于英国的全球生物制药公司，业务重点覆盖 oncology、cardiovascular, renal and metabolism、respiratory and immunology、rare disease 等领域。

在肿瘤领域，AstraZeneca 的代表性产品包括 **[Imfinzi](../compound/Imfinzi.qmd)（durvalumab）**、Tagrisso、Lynparza 和 Enhertu 等。Imfinzi 是其核心免疫肿瘤产品之一，覆盖肺癌、胆道癌、肝癌、膀胱癌、子宫内膜癌和胃食管肿瘤等多个方向。

# Selected Products

| Product | Generic name | Area |
|---|---|---|
| [Imfinzi](../compound/Imfinzi.qmd) | Durvalumab | Oncology / Immuno-oncology |
| Tagrisso | Osimertinib | Oncology / EGFR-mutated NSCLC |
| [Lynparza](../compound/Lynparza.qmd) | Olaparib | Oncology / PARP inhibitor |
| Enhertu | Trastuzumab deruxtecan | Oncology / HER2 ADC |
| Farxiga | Dapagliflozin | Cardiovascular, renal and metabolism |
| Symbicort | Budesonide/formoterol | Respiratory |
| Crestor | Rosuvastatin | Cardiovascular |
